zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall於大約1512年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾哈利法可時，他的父親Robert Ramsden Sr.28歲，母親Johanna Beaumont24歲。他於1531年與Joanna Edlestone在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1591年7月3日在他的家鄉享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾阿爾蒙德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall于大约1512年出生在英国英格兰越可爾哈利法可时，他的父亲Robert Ramsden Sr.28岁，母亲Johanna Beaumont24岁。他于1531年与Joanna Edlestone在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1591年7月3日在他的家乡享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾阿爾蒙德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Ramsden in Cartworth, near Holmfirth (Yorkshire), recorded as Rommesdene in 1315 and Ramesdene in 1323. The placename derives from Old English ramm ‘ram’ (genitive rammes) or hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + denu ‘valley’.

habitational name from Ramsden in Benenden (Kent). The placename probably derives from Old English ramm ‘ram’ (genitive rammes), or perhaps an Old English personal name Ramm (genitive Rammes), + Old English denn ‘pasture’.

variants.name: Ramson
meanings: habitational name, either from Ramshorn in Bickington (Devon) or from Rampisham (Dorset).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall was born about 1512, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Ramsden Sr., was 28 and his mother, Johanna Beaumont, was 24. He married Joanna Edlestone in 1531, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 3 July 1591, in his hometown, at the age of 80, and was buried in Almondbury, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall est né environ 1512, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Ramsden Sr., avait 28 ans et sa mère, Johanna Beaumont, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Edlestone en 1531, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1591, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Almondbury, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall um 1512 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Ramsden Sr. 28 und seine Mutter Johanna Beaumont 24. Er hat 1531 in England, United Kingdom Joanna Edlestone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 3. Juli 1591 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Almondbury, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall è nato il circa 1512 nel Halifax, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Ramsden Sr., aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Beaumont, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Edlestone nel 1531, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 3 luglio 1591, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Almondbury, West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hallが約1512年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスで生まれた時，父Robert Ramsden Sr.は28歳，母Johanna Beaumontは24歳であった。1531年にイギリスイギリスでJoanna Edlestoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1591年7月3日に故郷で80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアアルモンドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall(이)가 대략 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 할이파스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Ramsden Sr.(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Beaumont(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1531년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joanna Edlestone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1591년 7월 3일 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 알몽버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall nasceu aproximadamente 1512, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Ramsden Sr., tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Beaumont, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Edlestone em 1531, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 3 de julho de 1591, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Almondbury, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall родился около 1512 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Ramsden Sr. было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Beaumont, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Edlestone в 1531 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 3 июля 1591 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности алмондбури, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Ramsden Esq of Longley Hall nació aproximadamente 1512, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Ramsden Sr., tenía 28 años y su mamá, Johanna Beaumont, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joanna Edlestone en 1531, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 3 de julio de 1591, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Almondbury, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
